summary: Comprehensive testing completed - 100% pass rate achieved. All backend APIs (25/25) and frontend features working correctly. All previous bugs fixed: notifications endpoint, beneficiary test, real spending calculation, P2P transfer form (no IBAN).
passed_tests: Backend: Get spending insights (200) - Real data: €353.00
Backend: Get monthly spending (200) - Real data: €353.00 (not hardcoded €850.00)
Backend: Admin get all users (200) - 16 users
Backend: Disabled user login blocked (403) - Correct error message
Frontend: Dashboard loads with real monthly spending (€353.00)
Frontend: Notifications bell visible with badge (4)
Frontend: Notifications panel opens and displays 4 notifications
Frontend: P2P Transfer form has NO IBAN field (correct)
Frontend: P2P Transfer form has email, amount, reason fields
Frontend: Spending Insights page loads correctly
Frontend: Spending Insights shows pie chart with real data (€354.00)
Frontend: Spending Insights shows 3 categories: WITHDRAWALS (53%), TRANSFERS (7%), FEES (40%)
Frontend: Admin dashboard loads with sidebar
Frontend: Admin Overview page with stats and charts
Frontend: Admin Users section with search and filters
Frontend: Admin user detail page with Disable/Enable buttons
Frontend: Admin Ledger Operations visible (Top Up, Withdraw, Fee Charge, Transfer)
Frontend: Admin Accounts Control page with Top-up/Withdraw buttons
